title: Modal Dialog
subtitle: Overlay modal dialogs via CDK Overlay with full focus management, animations, minimization, and theme integration

basic.title: Basic confirm dialog
basic.description: Open a modal dialog using ModalDialogService.open() or the convenience helpers. The service provides options for title, message, confirm/cancel labels, color, and semantic type.

semanticTypes.title: Semantic types
semanticTypes.description: Use semantic helpers to quickly open pre-styled dialogs: openInfo(), openWarning(), openSuccess(), and openError().

verification.title: Verification dialog
verification.description: Require the user to type a specific phrase before confirming a destructive action. Use openVerification() or set verificationText in the config.

loader.title: Loader modal
loader.description: Display a non-closeable loading spinner overlay during long-running operations. Use openLoader() and close the reference when the operation completes.

dynamicComponent.title: Dynamic component
dynamicComponent.description: Open a modal with a custom Angular component as the body. Inject MODAL_DIALOG_DATA to receive data and MODAL_DIALOG_REF to control the modal from within.
dynamicComponent.seeCode: See the code examples below to integrate a custom component.

minimizable.title: Minimizable modal
minimizable.description: Allow users to minimize the modal to a dock chip at the bottom of the screen without losing context. Requires a unique id in the config.
minimizable.note: A unique id is required when minimizable: true. Calling open() with the same id will restore the minimized modal instead of creating a new one.

timeout.title: Timeout with progress bar
timeout.description: Automatically close the modal after a configurable duration. A visual progress bar tracks the remaining time and can be paused on mouse hover.

footerActions.title: Footer actions
footerActions.description: Customize the modal footer using customButtons, the ModalDialogActionsService (from inside the dynamic component), or the [nuiModalDialogFooter] directive.

statusBar.title: Status bar
statusBar.description: Add a colored border stripe to one side of the modal to convey additional semantic information using the statusBar config option.

service.title: ModalDialogService — methods
service.description: Inject ModalDialogService to open and manage modals. All methods return a ModalDialogRef.

config.title: ModalDialogConfig — properties
config.description: Configuration object passed to open(). Properties are merged with the global defaults from provideNUI().

ref.title: ModalDialogRef — methods
ref.description: The reference returned by open(). Use it to close the modal, listen to events, and observe lifecycle changes.

tokens.title: Injection tokens
tokens.description: Use these tokens to inject modal context inside a dynamic component loaded by the service.

colors.title: Color tokens
colors.description: Override these CSS custom properties to adjust modal dialog colors for your brand or custom theme.

layout.title: Layout tokens
layout.description: Control dimensions, spacing, typography, and layer (z-index) of the modal dialog via these CSS variables.

dock.title: Dock tokens
dock.description: Customize the appearance of chip items in the minimized modal dock.

keys.title: i18n keys
keys.description: All user-facing text in Modal Dialog can be overridden via provideNuiI18n() or the per-modal config for labels.

override.title: Global override
override.description: Provide custom translations globally using provideNuiI18n() in your app.config.ts.

roles.title: ARIA roles and attributes
roles.description: The modal shell automatically applies the required ARIA attributes for screen reader compatibility.

focus.title: Focus management
focus.description: The CDK FocusTrap ensures keyboard navigation is confined to the modal while it is open.
focus.note: Focus is automatically restored to the element that triggered the modal when it closes.

options.title: Global config options
options.description: Default values applied to every modal opened with ModalDialogService. Override per-modal by passing config to open().

example.title: Usage example
example.description: Configure global defaults in your app.config.ts using provideNUI().
